overview.title: Overview
overview.body: This policy explains how Novel Insight Property L.L.C (“NIP”) collects, uses and protects your information when you use our website and advisory services. It applies to all visitors and clients.

information-we-collect.title: Information we Collect
information-we-collect.body: We collect details you provide directly — such as your name, contact details and property preferences — and limited technical data needed to operate the site securely and improve your experience.

how-we-use-it.title: How we Use it
how-we-use-it.body: Your information is used to respond to enquiries, provide advisory services, and share curated opportunities where you have consented. We do not sell your data.

sharing-disclosure.title: Sharing & Disclosure
sharing-disclosure.body: We share information only with vetted partners necessary to deliver a service you requested (for example, legal advisers for a Golden Visa), and where required by law.

data-retention.title: Data Retention
data-retention.body: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to provide our services and meet legal obligations.

your-rights.title: Your Rights
your-rights.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us using the details below.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about this policy can be directed to info@niprealty.com or to our office at One Central, Dubai, UAE.

advisory.question: How does NIP's Private Advisory work?
advisory.answer: We start with your mandate, then privately source and shortlist residences and projects that fit — grounded in market data and developer track record. There are no public shortlists; everything is handled discreetly with a dedicated advisor.

fees.question: Do you Charge buyers a Fee?
fees.answer: Our advisory is aligned with your interests. We are transparent about how we are compensated on any transaction before you commit.

goldenVisa.question: Can you help with the Golden Visa?
goldenVisa.answer: Yes. We guide qualifying clients through property-linked Golden Visa requirements and connect you with vetted legal partners where needed.

offPlanReady.question: Do you handle Off-Plan and Ready properties?
offPlanReady.answer: Both. We advise across ready residences, exclusive resales, and off-plan launches with payment plans from leading developers.

responseTime.question: How Quickly will an Advisor Respond?
responseTime.answer: A private advisor typically responds within one business day, often sooner during business hours.

hero.eyebrow: A Private Advisory View | Dubai Real Estate
hero.title:
For Those Who
Expect More
hero.body: Dubai real estate has no shortage of choice. The difference lies in knowing what deserves your attention. NIP brings together market insight, editorial perspective, and private advisory for clients who want to move with judgment.

featuredInsight.title: Featured Insight
featuredInsight.desc: A closer look at the signals, locations, and ownership decisions shaping Dubai's next chapter.

curatedCollection.title: Curated Collection
curatedCollection.desc: A considered selection of properties, projects, and places connected by a clear point of view - not a search filter.

marketPulse.title: Market Pulse
marketPulse.desc: Track the Market Signals that matter before they Become Headlines

privateOffice.title: Private Office
privateOffice.desc: For clients introduced to NIP, Private Office provides access to selected opportunities, advisor notes, and private property intelligence.

featuredSelection.title: Featured Selection

cta.title: Not Sure Where to Begin
cta.desc: Speak with NIP before you search. Our advisory team can help you understand the market, define your priorities, and identify what is worth your attention.

hero.title: Find your Place in Dubai
hero.description: Search and discover curated properties across Dubai with NIP Reality.

hero.title: Future-Ready Projects
hero.description: Explore off-plan opportunities across Dubai's most compelling communities.

hero.title: Explore Dubai's Communities
hero.description: A considered guide to the neighbourhoods shaping long-term value across Dubai.

hero.title: Dubai's Leading Developers
hero.description: Master developers shaping Dubai's skyline and long-term community value.

hero.title: Market Perspective
hero.description: Editorial intelligence on Dubai real estate — signals, communities, and ownership decisions.

hero.title: One Source. One System. One Standard.
hero.description: NIP was created for clients who want more than access to property. They want context, judgment, and a single advisory standard across every step of the real estate journey.

market.title: Dubai's Property Market moves Quickly
market.body: New launches, private resales, waterfront residences, branded developments, and selected off-market opportunities appear every day. For private clients, the challenge is not finding options. The challenge is knowing which options deserve attention.

role.title: We do not Begin with Inventory
role.body: We begin with the client's context: purpose, timing, risk, lifestyle, capital strategy, and long-term view. From there, we help identify the areas, developers, projects, and properties that align with the brief.

partners.caption:
Trusted Partnership
with Dubai's Leading Developers

standard.title: NIP is Built around a Simple Standard:
standard.quote: "One source for insight. One system for decision-making. One standard for every client journey."

hero.title: Speak with NIP
hero.description: A considered property decision begins with a conversation

intro.body: Whether you are exploring Dubai for residence, investment, relocation, portfolio strategy, or a private acquisition, NIP can help you understand the market before you commit to a path.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.description: Everything you need to know about working with NIP — buying, off-plan, the Golden Visa and our private advisory.
